# Standard Reference Layout — Bento 3 Left Split

Reference example for a mirrored three-compartment Standard layout.

## Box

- External dimensions: 150 x 200 x 100 mm
- Material thickness: 3 mm
- Kerf: 0.1 mm

## Internal layout

- One traversing primary vertical separator
- One partial secondary horizontal separator on the left zone
- Result: two stacked compartments on the left and one large compartment on the right

## Generated files

- box50-150x200x100-standard-bento-3-left-split-layout.svg
- box50-150x200x100-standard-bento-3-left-split-cut.svg

## Source layout

- generator/layouts/bento-3-left-split-150x200x100.json
